description: Use this skill when Raul asks to run an AI smoke research test, AI surface test, browser desktop AI test, focus Codex and Claude then search Reddit/X, or summarize live AI chatter from Claude/OpenClaw/Hermes style searches. It executes the repeatable desktop-plus-browser smoke workflow, sends screenshot proof after visible desktop focus actions unless Raul explicitly skips proof, collects read-only Reddit/X signals, and reports only after tool-backed verification.
triggers: search reddit and x for ai
focus codex and claude then search x
focus Codex and Claude then search Reddit
send screenshot proof after focusing Codex
